info.description: Hero section content for the solutions page

headline.default: Smart, Secure, and Scalable Solutions, Tailored for the Digital Future

highlightText.description: Text to highlight with gradient (should be part of headline)

description.default: At ACT, we deliver holistic technology ecosystems designed to empower enterprises, governments, and industries.

subDescription.default: From digital modernization and hybrid IT to AI-powered networking and Zero Trust cybersecurity, our solutions ensure your operations are always connected, protected, and ready for what's next.
